What do the key developments and performance data (metrics) in the Dutch SaaS landscape look like? We found out for you through interviews and our own survey among Dutch SaaS entrepreneurs. We also spoke to venture capital firms that invest in SaaS companies. Entrepreneurs cite managing international growth as one of the main challenges.

id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__c5-sentence-window__0009
text: What do the key developments and performance data (metrics) in the Dutch SaaS landscape look like? We found out for you through interviews and our own survey among Dutch SaaS entrepreneurs. We also spoke to venture capital firms that invest in SaaS companies. Entrepreneurs cite managing international growth as one of the main challenges. Venture capital firms focus on global scalability and international growth.

id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__c5-sentence-window__0010
text: We found out for you through interviews and our own survey among Dutch SaaS entrepreneurs. We also spoke to venture capital firms that invest in SaaS companies. Entrepreneurs cite managing international growth as one of the main challenges. Venture capital firms focus on global scalability and international growth. They set high requirements for a SaaS company’s metrics.

text: We also spoke to venture capital firms that invest in SaaS companies. Entrepreneurs cite managing international growth as one of the main challenges. Venture capital firms focus on global scalability and international growth. They set high requirements for a SaaS company’s metrics. What do those requirements look like?

metadata.source_slug: Het groeigeweld van software as a service

id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__c5-sentence-window__0012
text: Entrepreneurs cite managing international growth as one of the main challenges. Venture capital firms focus on global scalability and international growth. They set high requirements for a SaaS company’s metrics. What do those requirements look like? And what are the key metrics that Dutch entrepreneurs use to steer their company?

metadata.chunk_id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__c5-sentence-window__0012
metadata.source_slug: Het groeigeweld van software as a service

id: Het groeigeweld van software as a service__c5-sentence-window__0013
text:
Venture capital firms focus on global scalability and international growth. They set high requirements for a SaaS company’s metrics. What do those requirements look like? And what are the key metrics that Dutch entrepreneurs use to steer their company? In summary
Software developers benefit from strong demand for SaaS
Predictability makes SaaS a powerful business model
International growth is a key challenge according to entrepreneurs
More information.
